question: What are the names of clubs that do not have any players?
sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Club_ID FROM player);

back_translation.intent: 查询不在player表中的俱乐部名称
filters: Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Club_ID FROM player)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求找出无球员的俱乐部名称，SQL通过子查询排除所有在player表中存在的Club_ID，正确实现了该逻辑。
